caption: A video begins with a rapid panning shot across an indoor gymnasium. The space features a polished wooden basketball court and blue padded walls, with sets of bleachers visible along the perimeter. The camera moves quickly, creating a motion blur as it transitions from a wide view of the court toward the bleachers. The scene then cuts abruptly to a close-up of a young man with short, light-brown hair and a beard. He is wearing a red sleeveless athletic tank top. He stands in front of the blue and yellow bleachers, looking directly into the camera with a neutral expression and his mouth slightly open, as if speaking. The background remains consistent between these final frames, focusing entirely on the man from the chest up.
